sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79401" key="parenta/ttw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρεν-τάττω</orth>, <sense id="n79401.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">insert</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μεσότητας</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1020a</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1022c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
